narrative:
Precinct Harrison C (precinct in Scioto County) has 543 registered voters, with 61.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.4%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.5 percentage points.
